flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 28% at Northland Community and Technical College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.4k vs 1.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northland Community and Technical College fell 18% between 2006 and 2009 (35.5% → 29.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northland Community and Technical College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northland Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).
